name: Taco Patties
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine meat, onion, salt, Worcestershire sauce, and pepper in a bowl.
2. Shape the mixture into six patties, each about 3/4-inch thick.
3. Brown the patties in a large skillet over medium-high heat, turning once.
4. Remove the patties and set aside. Drain any excess fat from the skillet.
5. Add water and taco seasoning mix to the same skillet; bring to a boil.
6. Reduce heat and return the patties to the skillet. Turn each patty to coat with the sauce.
7. Peel avocado and cut into 6 rings.
8. Top each patty with an avocado ring. Cover and simmer for 10 minutes.
9. Sprinkle cheese over the patties; cover and continue cooking until melted, about 2 minutes.
10. Serve with the sauce.
NOTE: You can substitute 1 medium tomato, sliced, for the avocado rings.
